issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Calling `setType` after calling `setData` will clear the data: Call `setDataAndType` instead?
Calling `setType` after calling `setData` will clear the data: Call `setDataAndType` instead?
Apps that use Firebase Cloud Messaging should implement `onNewToken()` in order to observe token changes
Call requires API level 33, or core library desugaring (current min is 31): `java.net.URLEncoder#encode`
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Attribute `localeConfig` is only used in API level 33 and higher (current min is 31)
Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more
Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more

This `minSdkVersion` value (`31`) is not used; it is always overridden by the value specified in the Gradle build script (`31`)
This `targetSdkVersion` value (`35`) is not used; it is always overridden by the value specified in the Gradle build script (`35`)
This declaration is opt-in and its usage should be marked with `@androidx.media3.common.util.UnstableApi` or `@OptIn(markerClass = androidx.media3.common.util.UnstableApi.class)`
This declaration is opt-in and its usage should be marked with `@androidx.media3.common.util.UnstableApi` or `@OptIn(markerClass = androidx.media3.common.util.UnstableApi.class)`

Modifier factory functions should be extensions on Modifier
Modifier factory functions should be extensions on Modifier

Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter

Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Switch statement on an `int` with known associated constant missing case `Player.STATE_BUFFERING`, `Player.STATE_IDLE`
Target state parameter `it` is not used
"my_profile_avatar_slot_summary" is not translated in "ko" (Korean), "ja" (Japanese), "zh" (Chinese)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="my_profile_avatar_slot_summary">Tap to switch or create a persona slot.</string>

issue.message: "my_profile_avatar_slot_dialog_title" is not translated in "ko" (Korean), "ja" (Japanese), "zh" (Chinese)
"my_profile_avatar_slot_new_label" is not translated in "ko" (Korean), "ja" (Japanese), "zh" (Chinese)
"my_profile_avatar_slot_use_selected" is not translated in "ko" (Korean), "ja" (Japanese), "zh" (Chinese)
"sessions_import_chat" is not translated in "ko" (Korean), "ja" (Japanese), "en" (English), "zh" (Chinese)
"sessions_export_chat" is not translated in "ko" (Korean), "ja" (Japanese), "en" (English), "zh" (Chinese)

"roles_menu_import" is not translated in "ko" (Korean), "ja" (Japanese), "en" (English)

"chat_continuity_debug_action" is not translated in "ko" (Korean), "ja" (Japanese), "zh" (Chinese)
"chat_continuity_debug_title" is not translated in "ko" (Korean), "ja" (Japanese), "zh" (Chinese)
"chat_continuity_runtime_state_label" is not translated in "ko" (Korean), "ja" (Japanese), "zh" (Chinese)

Formatting %d followed by words ("characters"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string

Replace "-" with an "en dash" character (–, –) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="add_calendar_event_message">カレンダーに「チームミーティング（10:00-11:00）」を追加しています。</string>

issue.message: Replace "-" with an "en dash" character (–, –) ?
issue.errorLine1:
<string name="role_editor_help_character_version_body">役割：
カードの手動バージョン表示です。

空欄の影響：
バージョン表示がなくなるだけです。

推奨内容と長さ：
v1、1.2.0、2026-04 など簡潔な表記が向いています。上限は 32 文字です。</string>

issue.message: Replace "-" with an "en dash" character (–, –) ?
issue.errorLine1:
<string name="role_editor_help_character_version_body">역할:
카드의 수동 버전 표기입니다.

비워둘 때 영향:
버전 표시만 사라집니다.

권장 내용과 길이:
v1, 1.2.0, 2026-04 같은 간결한 표기가 적합합니다. 상한은 32자입니다.</string>

issue.message: Replace "-" with an "en dash" character (–, –) ?
issue.errorLine1:
<string name="role_editor_help_character_version_body">作用：
角色版本是手动维护的发布标签。

留空影响：
卡片只是不显示版本号。

建议内容与长度：
推荐使用 v1、1.2.0、2026-04 这类简洁格式。编辑器预算为 32 个字符。</string>

issue.message: Replace "-" with an "en dash" character (–, –) ?
issue.errorLine1:
<string name="role_editor_help_character_version_body">What it does:
Character version is a manual release label for the card.

If left empty:
The card simply has no visible version marker.

Recommended content and length:
Use concise values such as v1, 1.2.0, or 2026-04. The editor budget is 32 characters.</string>

issue.message: Replace "-" with an "en dash" character (–, –) ?
issue.errorLine1:
<string name="role_editor_help_character_version_body">What it does:
Character version is a manual release label for the card.

If left empty:
The card simply has no visible version marker.

Recommended content and length:
Use concise values such as v1, 1.2.0, or 2026-04. The editor budget is 32 characters.</string>

`onTouch` lambda should call `View#performClick` when a click is detected
